courseTitle: Track Studio I: Methods and Media
title: Interpretive Scoring Game
genericDescription: Build scoring around interpretation rather than pure optimization; reveal values through evaluation; support multiple defensible outcomes.
specificDescription: Build a game with a scoring or feedback system that evaluates interpretive choices, aesthetic decisions, historical arguments, or AI collaboration patterns. Include a score explanation screen.
gradingRubric: 30 pts interpretive scoring model; 20 pts outcome variety; 20 pts transparency; 15 pts track relevance; 15 pts reflection.
